description: Social-emotional learning and school-based mental health solution.
rationale: Сервис заботы о самочувствии напрямую соответствует решению Rhithm, отслеживающему эмоциональное состояние учеников и предотвращающему стресс.

name: Riipen
description: Connecting students with companies to work on real projects, for course credit.
rationale: Стартап является платформой для связи студентов с реальными проектами компаний, а ИИ-агенты каталога нацелены на внутренние образовательные процессы, и ни один не реализует функциональность маркетплейса проектов.

name: SchoolMint
description: Student enrollment solution that enables school choice for families.
rationale: Стартап представляет административное решение для зачисления учеников, не связанное с персонализированной учебной траекторией или образовательным контентом, поэтому ни один из 44 ИИ-агентов каталога не соответствует ему.

name: Schoolzilla
description: Real-time data dashboards to power great schools.
rationale: Стартап предоставляет дашборды с данными реального времени для школ, что соответствует агенту формирования аналитических отчётов с визуализациями и рекомендациями.

name: Scout
description: Making learning business and finance entertaining, engaging, and accessible.
rationale: Стартап делает обучение финансам развлекательным и вовлекающим с помощью миссий, челленджей и соревнований, что прямо соответствует агенту игровых мотивационных механик.

name: Scout Edu
description: The AI-native student information system for K-12 schools.
rationale: Стартап создаёт AI-нативную систему информации об учениках, что ближе всего к функционалу ИИ-выгрузок и отчётов, формирующих аналитику прогресса для принятия решений.

name: Seesaw
description: Helping teachers, students, families, and school leaders work together to elevate learning
rationale: Seesaw — это цифровое портфолио для сбора и демонстрации работ учеников с вовлечением родителей, что соответствует функции ИИ-агента портфолио.

name: SmartPass
description: A digital hall pass that increases time in class, curbs vandalism, and makes school safer
rationale: Стартап представляет собой цифровой пропуск для управления перемещениями и безопасностью, не связанный с персонализированным обучением или учебными материалами, что не соответствует ни одному агенту каталога.

name: Snorkl
description: AI-powered feedback that understands student work in any format — voice, video, or drawing.
rationale: Стартап Snorkl предоставляет AI-обратную связь по работам в любом формате (видео, аудио, рисунки), что соответствует агенту ИИ-асессор, который автоматически оценивает сложные творческие и проектные работы с развёрнутым анализом.

name: Songscription
description: Empowering musicians worldwide to play and share the songs they love
rationale: Стартап ориентирован на музыкантов и совместное исполнение песен, не соответствует функциональности ни одного ИИ-агента из каталога.

name: Springboard
description: Workforce training for in-demand digital skills.
rationale: Стартап Springboard сочетает обучение цифровым навыкам с карьерными перспективами, что соответствует агенту профориентации, связывающему учебные цели с профессиональными возможностями.

name: Sprout Labs
description: Predicting reading difficulties for students and empowering teachers, parents and clinicians with customized action plans and resources.
rationale: Сервис предсказывает трудности в чтении и предоставляет персонализированные планы действий и ресурсы, что наиболее близко к генерации формирующей обратной связи с конкретными рекомендациями по улучшению.

name: Stellic
description: Powering the path to graduation
rationale: Стартап помогает студентам планировать путь к получению диплома, что соответствует генерации персонализированной траектории обучения.

name: Straia
description: AI-powered business intelligence for higher education.
rationale: Стартап Straia предлагает AI-аналитику и бизнес-отчётность для высшего образования, что ближе всего к агенту 'ИИ-выгрузки и отчеты', формирующему аналитические отчёты с визуализациями и рекомендациями, хотя и ориентированному на прогресс учеников, а не на общевузовскую BI.

name: SuperHi
description: The education protocol of the internet, allowing people to learn and get paid for sharing high-quality, accessible skills content.
rationale: Стартап является протоколом для публикации и монетизации образовательного контента любыми авторами, что не совпадает ни с одним ИИ-агентом, предназначенным для персонализированного обучения, создания материалов учителем или организации класса.

name: Suraasa
description: Helping global teachers achieve greater professional and financial growth in their careers.
rationale: Стартап направлен на профессиональное развитие учителей, в то время как все агенты каталога ориентированы на учебный процесс учащихся и инструменты для преподавателей в классе.

name: TeachFX
description: Analyzing classroom dialogue to empower teachers with feedback on student engagement
rationale: В каталоге нет агента, анализирующего диалог в классе для обратной связи об уровне вовлеченности; все агенты обратной связи ориентированы на оценивание учеников или сбор откликов, но не на объективный анализ речевого взаимодействия.

name: TeachShare
description: The one-stop shop for adaptive education — create, differentiate, gamify, share, auto-grade, sell — all on one platform
rationale: Стартап делает акцент на создании дифференцированного (разноуровневого) учебного контента, что совпадает с назначением агента.

name: Teachy
description: AI-powered workspace for teachers
rationale: Teachy представляет собой общее AI-powered workspace для учителей, не соответствующее ни одному конкретному агенту из каталога ПМО.

name: The Disagreement
description: A media and learning company that models and celebrates healthy disagreement in all walks of life
rationale: Ни один из агентов каталога не предназначен для моделирования и обучения конструктивному несогласию.

name: The Podcast App
description: Powerful, intuitive search platform for the world of podcasting
rationale: Стартап представляет собой поисковую платформу для подкастов, что ближе всего к агенту 'Библиотека контента', предоставляющему структурированный доступ к учебным материалам с возможностями поиска и фильтрации.

name: Thinkverse
description: An AI math tutor for every K-12 student
rationale: Стартап является ИИ-репетитором по математике, отвечающим на вопросы учеников; это максимально соответствует агенту «ИИ-помощник», предоставляющему объяснения и подсказки по содержанию курса.

name: Twenty
description: Real-world career & life advice to help people crush their twenties
rationale: Стартап предлагает внеакадемические карьерные и жизненные советы для людей в возрасте 20 лет, что не соответствует ни одному из ИИ-агентов, предназначенных для персонализированной образовательной модели в формальном обучении.

name: Tynker
description: Self-paced coding courses for kids
rationale: Tynker предлагает самоуправляемые курсы программирования для детей в игровом формате с интерактивными заданиями, что максимально соответствует агенту, генерирующему учебные материалы в игровой механике.

name: Wayfinder
description: Culturally responsive social-emotional learning and mental health curriculum designed to help students find meaning in today’s world.
rationale: Стартап предлагает учебную программу по социально-эмоциональному обучению и ментальному здоровью, агент 10 отслеживает эмоциональное состояние и предупреждает о стрессе, что частично пересекается по заботе о благополучии, но агент не является образовательной программой.

name: WriteLab
description: Immediate, automated writing feedback powered by artificial intelligence.
rationale: WriteLab предоставляет автоматизированную обратную связь по письменным работам, что напрямую соответствует функции ИИ-агента формирующей обратной связи, генерирующего развивающие комментарии с рекомендациями по улучшению.

name: YourEDU
description: All-in-One Homeschool Management Platform
rationale: Платформа YourEDU позиционируется как all-in-one решение для управления домашним обучением, и её центральным элементом, скорее всего, является персонализированное планирование учебного маршрута, что наиболее близко к агенту генерации траектории.

name: Codecademy
description:
Working professionals are experiencing their jobs changing amidst the rise of technology and automation threatens over 800 million jobs. At the same time, software is eating the world, disrupting every major industry, and creating millions of new technology jobs that companies are eager to fill. This is the skills gap. Our mission is closing it.

In 2011, we changed the face of education by creating free interactive coding courses explored by over 45 million people. As we look to the future, we're focused on helping anyone get the skills they need for the jobs they want.  We aim to bridge the gap: between companies and the workforce, people and their dream jobs. Join one of the most dynamic technology companies in New York that is changing the way the world learns.

Headquartered in New York City, our team is filled with highly curious diverse individuals whose backgrounds span tech and education. Our team is passionate about our mission: helping people get the skills they need for the jobs they want. We seek transparency, thrive on feedback, value teamwork, love evolving and never forget it's people first. We enjoy catered lunches together, company outings, guest speakers and long walks on the beach.
rationale: Codecademy предоставляет интерактивные курсы с автоматической проверкой кода, что соответствует агенту ИИ-проверки задач, автоматизирующему проверку стандартных заданий.

name: Clever
description:
Clever is a single platform for all of your digital learning programs. Founded in 2012, Clever was started by educators and technology professionals who knew that schools, teachers, and students could all benefit from the amazing learning software that was available, but key challenges stood in the way of accessing the technology. Today, half of K-12 schools in the U.S. use Clever to give students and teachers single sign-on access for any resource or file they need, and to automate software account setup and updates for district administrators. Clever gives teachers time to teach, helps districts be better informed, and makes using applications in the classroom effortless.

We are a team of more than 100 people passionate about education. If you feel the same way, you should see our openings at https://clever.com/about/jobs.
rationale: Clever — платформа единого входа и автоматизации учётных записей, не соответствует ни одному агенту из каталога.

name: Outschool
description:
Outschool is an innovative education platform that offers a variety of engaging, small-group classes online. Unlike traditional classes, Outschool classes give kids the unique opportunity to explore their interests in-depth via interactive, live video by experienced, independent educators.

When Outschool was founded in 2015, homeschoolers were the first to discover our classes, but it wasn’t long before kids in conventional schools began supplementing their education with fun and unique, interest-based classes. During the COVID-19 pandemic, Outschool became vital to families who wanted to keep kids learning, social, and pursuing their passions.
Today, Outschool offers more than 140,000 live online classes to more than 1,000,000 learners in 183 countries worldwide.
rationale: Платформа Outschool основана на интерактивных живых видеозанятиях в малых группах, что соответствует функциональности ИИ-агента видеосервиса с комнатами для групповой онлайн-работы.

name: GiveCampus
description: GiveCampus is the world's #1 fundraising platform for non-profit educational institutions. Trusted by millions of donors and more than 1,500 colleges, universities, and K-12 schools, our mission is to advance the quality, the affordability, and the accessibility of education. Since 2015, we have facilitated more than $7 billion in charitable giving.
rationale: Стартап GiveCampus — платформа для фандрайзинга образовательных учреждений, не совпадает по функциональности ни с одним ИИ-агентом каталога.

name: Platzi
description:
Platzi cracked online education. It teaches courses on design, marketing and programming with a 70% completion rate, to over one million students worldwide.

The classes include real-time collaboration among students and industry leaders as teachers. It aims to be the professional home for lifelong learning of advanced skills.
rationale: Platzi создаёт среду для совместного обучения в реальном времени, что наиболее близко к виртуальному рабочему пространству для группового взаимодействия, описанному в агенте 39.

name: CodeCombat
description:
CodeCombat is a multiplayer programming game for learning how to code. With thousands of schools and millions of students, we are bringing K12 computer science education to everyone, regardless of gender, race, or background. Everyone should have the opportunity to learn.

The ultimate goal of CodeCombat is to bring more users into the field of computer programming by making the logic and syntax more accessible and enjoyable to learn. The end game is to educate a whole new generation of computer programmers that started their journey by slaying ogres and defending their castles from oncoming enemy hordes.

We teach Python, JavaScript, and other languages directly in the browser. Teachers with no computer science background can get started in five minutes. In a world where all programmers have had to be second-language learners, do you want your students to become native speakers of code? Let's chat about bringing CodeCombat to your school!

Find us on Twitter at https://twitter.com/CodeCombat
rationale: CodeCombat — это игровая обучающая платформа, а агент №20 генерирует игровой учебный контент, что наиболее близко по сути: обучение через игровое взаимодействие ради вовлечения.

name: Cambly
description: The Cambly app gives English learners instant 1-on-1 access to friendly native speakers over video chat 24/7. Students get an affordable and convenient way to practice their English and gain confidence. Tutors get to make money helping people from around the world practice English.
rationale: Cambly — это платформа для общения с живыми репетиторами, не соответствующая ни одному ИИ-агенту каталога, автоматизирующему учебные процессы.

name: Panorama Education
description: Panorama Education partners with K-12 districts to support student success in the classroom and beyond through a secure, research-backed software platform for AI, student support, and community voice and engagement. Serving 15 million students nationwide, Panorama helps educators boost achievement, attendance, behavior, and readiness for graduation and beyond.
rationale: Платформа Panorama Education собирает данные обратной связи от сообщества и формирует аналитику для повышения успеваемости и поддержки, что схоже с функцией ИИ-выгрузок и отчетов.

name: CleverDeck
description:
CleverDeck is a customizable-spaced repetition flashcard application for learning foreign language vocabulary.

It contains more than three thousand useful words along with images, native speaker audio, and example sentences.
rationale: CleverDeck — это библиотека готовых флеш-карточек с мультимедиа, что соответствует концепции структурированной библиотеки учебных материалов с возможностью поиска и фильтрации.

name: Risely AI
description:
Risely’s AI agents will form the new operating system for universities, improving retention, staff productivity, and efficiency. Our platform integrates directly into existing university systems (SIS, LMS, CRM), learns each institution’s unique workflows, and deploys specialized AI agents. This dramatically reduces the $735 billion universities spend annually on administrative labor, expands staff capacity without increasing headcount, and improves the student experience.

This hasn't been done before because university workflows require nuanced, autonomous judgment, exactly what agentic AI was designed to solve. Our team uniquely combines deep expertise in higher education, enterprise-scale AI, and regulated enterprise sales.

Sadia previously built Salesforce’s Education Cloud from scratch, creating the core Student Information System widely used across higher education. She deeply understands university operations and maintains trusted relationships with hundreds of higher-ed CIOs and Provosts.

Danial was one of DoorDash’s earliest engineers, where he architected and scaled complex systems from zero to billions of transactions, including their search, recommendation, and Voice AI platforms. He knows how to build robust AI solutions that reliably perform at enterprise scale.

Shahryar was a GM at Airwallex, where he built the entire Americas business from 0 to 1 and drove 11x revenue growth.  He’s also a master closer, single-handedly securing over $17M in enterprise deals at NerdWallet.  He’s a relentless startup executor with deep expertise launching and scaling go-to-market machines in highly regulated industries.

We launched six weeks ago and are already at $8k MRR, growing 55% week-over-week -- one of the fastest ramps ever in higher ed. Universities urgently need solutions that expand labor capacity and efficiency, especially as they face unprecedented budget pressure and staffing shortages.

With unmatched buyer access, deep technical expertise, and rapid early traction, we are perfectly positioned to own this enormous market.
rationale: Стартап автоматизирует административные процессы университетов, а не образовательный процесс, поэтому не соответствует ни одному из агентов каталога.

name: Frizzle
description:
Frizzle uses AI to grade handwritten math assignments for teachers and transform them into rich analytics and differentiated assessment to help personalize instruction for every student. Teachers spend over 10 hours a week or 25% of all their work grading - Frizzle does it in minutes. Frizzle is the most valuable piece of software for teachers ever, as it eliminates the most time-consuming part of their workflow so they can focus on teaching.

Frizzle shifts education from waterfall to agile learning. Instead of waiting for end-of-unit tests to discover gaps, teachers get continuous, real-time insight into student thinking from everyday work. Feedback becomes immediate, instruction adapts weekly, and learning iterates (measure, adjust, improve) so every student progresses faster with less teacher burnout.

Frizzle was named an official White House AI Education Partner alongside OpenAI and Meta: https://www.whitehouse.gov/edai/.

Frizzle was co-founded by Abhay Gupta and Shyam Sai, who met in high school over 10 years ago.
rationale: Стартап автоматизирует проверку письменных работ и предоставляет аналитику, что наиболее близко к агенту ИИ-проверки задач.

name: Tegore
description:
Tegore follows K-12 school curriculum to design courses like Algebra I & Algebra II. In addition to working with high schools in the Bay Area to design the best in-classroom experiences, Tegore is developing the corresponding consumer product, a Duolingo for Math.

Each lesson in Tegore follows a lesson plan (e.g. Polynomial Long Division), and the content is delivered with voice / interactive visuals, and checks students' understanding by using dialectic teaching.
rationale: Tegore использует диалоговое обучение через интерактивные объяснения и проверку понимания, что близко к функции ИИ-ассистента, отвечающего на вопросы и дающего направляющие подсказки по содержанию курса.

name: Chiron
description: Chiron is an iPad app that understands math as it’s written - like Grammarly for algebra. We’re both Oxford math grads, have tutored for a decade, and we’re creating the future of learning which will be entirely 1-on-1.
rationale: Chiron как Grammarly для алгебры автоматически проверяет математические записи и указывает на ошибки, что реализует автоматизированную проверку стандартных заданий.

name: Units
description:
Units lets ambitious students graduate high school in 4 months instead of 4 years with real accredited diploma credits, plus a portfolio of real-world work, not just a transcript.

We're rebuilding school for a post-AGI world.
rationale: Стартап Units строит персонализированную траекторию для ускоренного освоения школьной программы, что напрямую соответствует ИИ-агенту генерации траектории, создающему адаптивный пошаговый план обучения.

name: YouLearn
description: YouLearn is an AI tutor for college students. It turns your learning materials into concise notes, an AI tutor you can talk to, and personalized tests.
rationale: YouLearn как ИИ-тьютор, с которым студент общается для получения ответов по материалам, наиболее соответствует агенту ИИ-помощника, отвечающему на вопросы по курсу.

name: Miyagi Labs
description:
Miyagi Labs is an AI-powered exam prep platform that helps students ace tests like the SAT and ACT through our AI tutor, personalized study plans, thousands of practice questions, and realistic practice exams.

We’re building the platform we wish we had when studying for exams. No more running out of practice questions. Track your progress as your rating in different exam categories increases, and know exactly what you need to practice most.

We envision a world where students anywhere can come to Miyagi to ace their exams and receive personalized, world-class AI tutoring designed to unlock their full potential.
rationale: Miyagi Labs создаёт персонализированные учебные планы на основе диагностики и прогресса, что напрямую совпадает с функцией ИИ-агента генерации траектории.

name: Scout
description:
The student information system (SIS) is the core system of record in every K-12 school. It tracks students, attendance, grades, schedules, staff, and more - kind of like the ERP for schools.

Legacy SIS providers do just about that, and not much more. School districts layer dozens of tools on top of their SIS to fill in the gaps.

Scout is an AI-powered student information system that automates school- and district-wide busywork, from day-to-day operations like attendance tracking to annual compliance reports. Our mission is to help school districts run like high-performing organizations, enabling them to provide high-quality, personalized instruction to every student.
rationale: Scout is an AI-powered student information system automating school operations and compliance, which does not align with any specific teaching or learning agent in the catalog.

name: Alice.tech
description:
Alice turns generic course materials into personalized learning and exam prep using AI. We’re Duolingo  for exams, and more than 10k college students have already used Alice.

Kim, the CEO, is a domain expert in education with more than 10+ years of university teaching experience. He is also technical by background.

MRR is $20k, growing +10% week-over-week the last 8 weeks

Alice's core market opportunity is +$10b, with the global education market being almost $10trillion. As AI starts to disrupt education, Alice will use in-built network effects and virality in its product to create a global winner.

Go Alice. Thank you!
rationale: Стартап создаёт персонализированную траекторию обучения и подготовки к экзаменам, адаптируя учебные материалы под каждого студента, что наиболее близко к функции ИИ-агента генерации траектории.

name: Excellence Learning
description:
Excellence an after-school maths and science program. We replace/supplement private tutoring and long-term study programs such as Kumon (over 30B TAM). US Parents are our primary customers.

Our web and iPad software serves both ambitious and struggling students. As we believe each student is unique, we adapt our high quality courses and exercises to their knowledge and learning style in a very granular way. To facilitate learning, they get detailed text, voice and graphical explanations, can craft study plans, revise and memorize, and received human mentorship if needed. We believe LLMs have made edtech interesting, as technology now allows us to replicate a tutoring learning experience.

In addition, we offer a program with daily courses and exercises, detailed feedback on their worksheets and more (super Kumon).

Finally we sell the AI tutoring and exercise databases to schools in a B2B and B2B2C model and already work for the most prestigious institutions in France (Ecole polytechnique, college Stanislas...).

We're a passionate team of ex-quants, mathematicians and physics champions devoted to improving science education.
rationale: Стартап Excellence Learning адаптивно строит индивидуальные учебные траектории с учётом знаний и стиля обучения, что максимально близко к агенту генерации персонализированной траектории.

name: Edexia
description:
Edexia is an AI Teacher Assistant for grading essays. It can be trained and controlled by the teacher and can grade assignments from any curriculum, year level, subject, or format.

Learning like a teacher, Edexia visually breaks down its understanding of the rubric, and updates this as a teacher corrects it.

Our vision is to transform education by facilitating AI’s safe and effective integration across all institutions and applications. Not using AI to replace teachers but rather to empower them—providing them with all the time and resources they need to develop their students.
rationale: Стартап Edexia представляет собой ИИ-ассистента для оценивания эссе по критериям, что наиболее близко к агенту 'ИИ-асессор', который автоматически оценивает сложные творческие и проектные работы по заданным критериям.

name: RevisionDojo
description:
RevisionDojo is building the AI study platform students actually obsess over.

Our platform houses pre-loaded question sets, study notes, mini-lessons guided by an AI tutor that adapts to each student individually.
rationale: Платформа с адаптивным ИИ-тьютором, подстраивающим обучение под ученика, наиболее близка к агенту генерации персонализированной траектории.

name: Educato
description:
Educato builds exam prep platforms worldwide using AI.

Online exam prep has existed for decades, yet the big players all target the same top 10 exams in the US. The reality is that most exams around the world still have little to no quality online prep material, including many taken by hundreds of thousands of students each year. Educato uses AI to generate high-quality prep content for these exams. LLMs allow us to target the profitable fat middle in the distribution of exams, historically overlooked by education companies.
rationale: Стартап использует ИИ для генерации учебного контента для подготовки к экзаменам, что напрямую соответствует функции ИИ-генератора контента.

name: Mathos
description:
Mathos AI (Formerly MathGPTPro) is the leading AI math solver that enables academic performance and productivity of both students and teachers. It has empowered over 1M students from over 200 countries in the past year, which turns the previously mission-impossible personalized learning into real. Our advanced math AI model achieves roughly 20% higher accuracy in mathematical and quantitative problem-solving capabilities then GPT4o.

As we move forward, we will tackle the hardest problems in the educational sector, personalization, adaptive learning, and shortages of teachers, with our trial runs in schools. By automating grading, providing insightful analytics, and generating adaptive assignments, our model empowers teachers to understand what their students need and what should be provided accordingly.
rationale: Mathos — это ИИ-решатель математических задач, который помогает ученикам, отвечая на вопросы и предлагая объяснения, что точно соответствует функции ИИ-помощника.

name: Shepherd
description: Shepherd is a Learning assistant for schools to provide to their students. Shepherd seamlessly combines AI-enabled self-study, affordable tutoring, peer collaboration, and analytics for a personalized learning experience that is both efficient and effective.
rationale: Стартап позиционируется как ИИ-ассистент для обучения, сочетающий самообучение и репетиторство, что наиболее близко к агенту «ИИ-помощник», отвечающему на вопросы учеников.

name: Deep24
description: Deep24 is a coach that syncs with all your data source, understanding you and then coming up with plans to improve your life.
rationale: Deep24 создает персонализированные планы улучшения жизни на основе данных пользователя, что наиболее близко к ИИ-агенту генерации учебной траектории, хотя и применимо к более широкому контексту.

name: MathDash
description: MathDash is an online math education platform that gets students addicted to working through textbooks and seeing their improvement.
rationale: Платформа MathDash нацелена на прохождение учебников и мотивацию через видимое улучшение, что наиболее близко к интерактивной карте знаний (Метаучебник), показывающей прогресс по темам.

name: Flint
description:
Flint is an AI-powered personalized learning platform for K-12 schools, helping teachers deliver individualized instruction at scale. Trusted by 500,000+ educators and students, Flint has powered learning activities that increase student engagement, academic performance, and collaboration.

Through AI-driven tutoring, real-time feedback, and interactive learning experiences, Flint enables every student to receive personalized support without adding to teacher workload.

With AI-native student analytics, educators gain full visibility into student progress, strengths, and areas for improvement, while saving time on grading, lesson planning, and differentiation. Students receive a 24/7 AI tutor that adapts to their level without giving away answers, supporting deeper understanding and independent thinking.

For schools and districts, Flint provides robust AI guardrails, including customizable moderation, grade-level controls, and full transparency into student usage, ensuring safe and responsible AI adoption.
rationale: Стартап предлагает AI-тьютора, который отвечает на вопросы учеников и адаптируется к их уровню, что напрямую соответствует функции ИИ-помощника (агент 8).

name: Studdy
description:
At Studdy, our mission is to unlock the full potential of the next generation by providing a personalized AI tutor for every student.

Studdy Buddy is a multilingual tutor that uses AI, as well as advanced speech, text, and image recognition technology to supercharge students' ability to learn new subjects.

We believe that making self-learning as easy as possible for as many students as possible (no matter their cultural, social, or educational background) is the key to unlocking the full potential of students around the world.

We're a passionate team of AI experts, educators, and builders - if you also have a passion for transforming education we'd love to hear from you.

Shoot us a message at team@studdy.ai!
rationale: Стартап Studdy создаёт персонализированного ИИ-тьютора, который отвечает на вопросы учеников и помогает осваивать предметы, что полностью совпадает с функционалом ИИ-помощника (агент 8).

name: Ora AI
description: Ora is an AI-native education platform that students love. We're starting with medical school, training students from matriculation to MD. Soon, we'll serve every corner of the $830B higher education market.
rationale: Стартап является комплексной AI-платформой для обучения, а каталог содержит отдельные специализированные инструменты, ни один из которых не охватывает одновременно персонализированную траекторию, генерацию контента и обратную связь в нужной степени.

name: Epsilon
description: Get answers to research questions with citations from the academic literature.
rationale: Стартап представляет собой ИИ-ассистента, отвечающего на исследовательские вопросы с цитатами из академической литературы, что частично пересекается с агентом «ИИ-помощник», отвечающим на вопросы учеников по содержанию курса, но не учитывает контекст конкретного курса и ориентирован на литературу.

name: Univerbal
description:
Univerbal is an AI-powered language learning app that helps people boost their confidence simply by talking. In unscripted and dynamic conversations, users can talk about anything they’d like using the microphone, with the AI responding as it adapts to their level and skills. Each user gets a personal AI Language Tutor that creates a custom learning plan based on the language goals they’d like to work towards and their own interests, offers instant corrections after every message and helps users in their own language.
Based in the country with 4 official languages, Switzerland, in 2024 we were selected as one of WIRED’s Hottest 100 Startups in Europe.
rationale: Стартап создаёт персонализированный план обучения на основе языковых целей и интересов, что напрямую совпадает с агентом генерации траектории, хотя также включает разговорную практику и мгновенную обратную связь.

name: SuperKalam
description: Every student deserve personal attention. With AI, we can infinitely scale personalised learning experience at scale to every student. That's what we are building at SuperKalam.
rationale: Стартап строит ИИ-ассистента для персонализированного внимания, что ближе всего к агенту-помощнику, отвечающему на вопросы учеников.

name: Darsel
description: Darsel is a AI-powered math education chatbot which is designed to supplement K12 education systems in resource-constrained environments. Darsel allows students to practice math questions & do their homework through platforms like SMS, WhatsApp and Facebook Messenger.
rationale: Стартап Darsel представляет собой ИИ-чат-бота для практики математики, что ближе всего к ИИ-помощнику (агент 8), хотя акцент Darsel на предоставлении заданий, а не просто ответах на вопросы по курсу.

name: Avocademy
description: Avocademy was born from a need for more diverse designers. Current design programs are expensive and not accessible. We make it accessible for anyone to break into the field and change careers. Our students are 75% women, 65% BIPOC, & 33% LGBTQ+.
rationale: Стартап Avocademy нацелен на смену карьеры в дизайне и делает образование доступным, что ближе всего к функции ИИ-профориентолога, связывающего учебные цели с профессиональными перспективами.

name: Lingt
description: Lingt empowers teachers to speak more with their students. Create and manage online speaking assignments for use in the classroom.
rationale: Стартап создаёт и управляет онлайн-заданиями по говорению, что не соответствует функционалу ни одного из представленных ИИ-агентов.

name: Toko
description:
Toko helps English learners in East Asia achieve speaking fluency. Through our mobile app, learners engage in short, realistic conversations with an AI and receive feedback on their grammar.

With over 500 topics, learners can practice real-world scenarios ranging from small talk to workplace discussions. Toko offers a low-pressure environment to help learners build up their confidence.

We make language fluency accessible to everyone - not just those with the means to meet 1:1 with a tutor.

In Taiwan (our first market), Toko is ranked top 3 in the App Store for Education!
rationale: Стартап представляет собой самостоятельное приложение для практики разговорного английского с ИИ-собеседником и грамматической обратной связью, не интегрированное в систему поддержки учителя и не совпадающее ни с одним из описанных агентов каталога.

name: MySivi
description:
MySivi is an AI-powered English learning app.

Learn English Speaking The Fastest Way (AI + Human) 😀
Practicing with AI English Tutor and Human is the fastest way to learn to speak. Try now to feel the change within a week.
rationale: MySivi предлагает AI-тьютора для разговорной практики, что функционально ближе всего к ИИ-помощнику, отвечающему на вопросы учеников по содержанию курса и ведущему диалог.

name: Koala
description:
PROBLEM 😩

Zoom is great for adults, not ideal to engage an 8 year old online.

SOLUTION 🔥

Koala Go, the award-winning interactive platform for online teaching businesses.

Learn more at https://teachwithkoala.com/
rationale: Стартап Koala — это интерактивная онлайн-платформа для обучения, заменяющая Zoom, с акцентом на совместную работу, что ближе всего к агенту «Пространство для работы в группе», предоставляющему виртуальное рабочее пространство с инструментами для группового взаимодействия.

name: Emerge Career
description: Vocational training programs and workforce management software for government agencies looking to create high-paying jobs and up-skill their low-income and justice-involved citizens out of poverty.
rationale: Стартап предлагает профессиональное обучение и ПО для управления трудовыми ресурсами для госорганов, что не соответствует ни одному ИИ-агенту каталога, ориентированному на персонализированное общее образование.

name: Careerist
description:
Careerist is an ed-fintech platform that trains job seekers for tech careers (in QA, Sales, Support & more), finances them and automates their job hunting. Our B2B2C platform aggregates job seekers, tutors and employers – streamlining training and placement.

Techcrunch: "Edtech meets SaaS in Careerist’s job placement learning platform. The startup trains job seekers through live and self-paced training taught by third-party tutors. The adaptive learning software is meant to help candidates prep for tech interviews. Once a candidate is well equipped, Careerist uses automation to help them apply for jobs."
rationale: Платформа Careerist нацелена на подготовку к техническим профессиям и трудоустройство, что наиболее близко к агенту ИИ-профориентолог, который связывает учебные цели с карьерными перспективами.

name: Stepful
description: Stepful trains people with a high school education in 4 months and places them into healthcare jobs. Healthcare is the fastest growing industry in the US accounting for 40% of all jobs added including medical assistants, nursing assistants, and phlebotomists.
rationale: Стартап по краткосрочному профессиональному обучению и трудоустройству взрослых в здравоохранении не соответствует ни одному ИИ-агенту, ориентированному на школьный учебный процесс и персонализированную модель образования.

name: Pandai
description:
💡 What is Pandai?

Pandai is an app that helps students get better grades in school.

Pandai provides gamified quizzes aligned to a specific school curriculum, from which students can learn, practice, get feedback, and diagnose their weaknesses.

🔥 Why do we build this?

In Southeast Asia, the education system is competitive and exam-oriented.

There is a huge demand for interventions (tutors, workbooks, and extra classes) to help students perform better in school. Pandai fills the demand with a solution that is better than the alternatives.

👨‍🏫 Who We Are

The three founders are based in Malaysia and have known each other since high school, 23 years ago.

After we graduated (from MIT & other US colleges), we started our first education company in 2007, focusing on coaching school students in STEM subjects.

We worked closely with students (many of them from underprivileged backgrounds) and saw firsthand the impact we’ve had on them.

We then realized that with technology, we could reach more students and bring more impact. Hence, we released Pandai in 2020.

🚀 Present & Future

Currently, we have launched in our home ground Malaysia in 2020.

So far, 280,000 students have completed 83 million questions on Pandai, and 92% of users have seen some improvement in their academic performance.

We plan to expand to Southeast Asia and other emerging markets, a market of 100M+ school students. Pandai is designed to be scalable, and our content (also available in English) can be mapped to other curricula from other countries.
rationale: Стартап Pandai предоставляет игровые викторины для обучения, что соответствует агенту генерации игрового учебного контента, повышающего вовлечённость.

name: Novatr
description:
Novatr (YC S21) offers online cohort-based courses for architects, engineers and designers in the AEC industry to advance their professional growth. We serve learners from 45+ countries including India, MENA, USA, Europe, and SEA. Our courses are delivered by professionals from global firms like Autodesk, BIG, Google, UNStudio, AECOM, and graduates are placed at top-tier architecture firms, construction companies and real estate companies.

Project-based learning and peer-to-peer interaction in cohort makes learning enriching and increases the completion rates to 84%. Learners work in groups of 2-6 on live projects and create significant outputs from scratch.

The company is led by alumni of SPA Delhi and IIT Madras.
rationale: Агент предоставляет виртуальное рабочее пространство для группового взаимодействия, что напрямую поддерживает ключевую особенность Novatr — обучение в малых группах над совместными проектами.

name: Filadd
description:
We provide premium, personalized courses for college entrance exams (like Chile’s PAES and Brazil’s ENEM) combining engaging video lessons, live tutoring, AI-powered study plans, and downloadable resources.
Today we serve over 25,000 students annually across Chile, Brazil, Argentina, and Colombia, with a 90% YoY growth and industry-leading margins.
rationale: Filadd создаёт персонализированные учебные планы с помощью ИИ для подготовки к экзаменам, что напрямую соответствует функции агента генерации пошаговой образовательной траектории.

name: Litnerd
description:
Litnerd is a kids reading + writing club app that grew by 14x this past school year. Think of us as a modern-day Scholastic, with a heavy IP play. We create original IP with our community + partner brands -> turn them into books, media and learning curriculum, layered with an AI personalized tutor to help kids learn to read and write in a personalized and engaging way.

Our product format is a Social and Gamified - with a live weekly community meetup and monthly e-tournaments.

- And it works! Litnerd 4x improved the pass rate of students on their annual state Reading (ELA) exam.
- STICKY: Kids spend 10-20 minutes on the Litnerd app OUTSIDE of classroom time.
- KID AUTHORS: Kids are the authors of the books and Litnerd AI helps illustrate + publish the book.
- Built on the Science of Reading
- Original IP: all books, media and courseware is original content created and published by Litnerd.
rationale: Litnerd — это социально-геймифицированный клуб чтения и письма с ежемесячными турнирами, что наиболее близко к агенту 'Миссии, челленджи, соревнования', создающему игровые соревновательные события и отслеживающему прогресс участников.

name: Spark Studio
description:
Meet Sparky, a fun and quirky AI buddy in the avatar of a friendly fox who kids can just speak with to build fluency and confidence with English speaking.
Powered by Generative AI, and made magical with child-appropriate experience, features and topics, Sparky brings a whole world of knowledge and a judgement-free environment for kids to become comfortable with speaking English.

142 countries (outside English dominant countries) mandate English learning as part of the national education policy. These kids have exposure to English but feel underconfident and embarrassed to speak. The biggest problem across the classes and books they get, is the lack of real conversational practice. With AI, we're making this affordable accessible and enjoyable for kids across the world.

We're a passionate team of educators with over 30 years of combined experience in building education products for kids and have held leadership positions are India's biggest education companies - Byju's and LEAD.
rationale: Стартап представляет собой ИИ-ассистента для разговорной практики английского, что функционально ближе всего к агенту «ИИ-помощник», который обеспечивает диалоговое взаимодействие с учеником по учебному контексту.

name: KaiPod Learning
description:
KaiPod Learning is a national network of microschools bringing school choice to every community in America. We work with education entrepreneurs to start high-quality microschools to better serve students and their families.

As more families stand up for choice in education and as more educators look for alternative career pathways, KaiPod Learning is helping bring microschools into the mainstream.
rationale: Стартап представляет собой сеть микрокол, а не ИИ-инструмент для персонализации или учебной деятельности, и не соответствует ни одному агенту каталога.

name: Kurios
description:
Kurios is cohort based online courses for professionals in Latin America. Our instructors are professionals coming out of tech companies like Google, Amazon, Stripe and more.

Our course completion rate is 90% and annual customer retention rate is 100%.

We have 65 B2B customers and we up-skill their employees in product management, growth and data analytics, just to start with.

Some customers: Walmart Mexico, Banorte (2nd bank in Mexico), Mercado Libre, BCP (#1 bank in Peru), Alicorp (leading CPG in Latam), Sura (leading pension fund), etc.
rationale: Платформа для когортного онлайн-обучения наиболее близка к агенту «Пространство для работы в группе», поскольку он создаёт виртуальное рабочее пространство для группового взаимодействия — ключевого элемента когортного формата.

name: Jovian
description:
Jovian is an online university for software development and data science. We offer practical and industry-focused programs that help professionals learn technical skills, build real-world projects, and advance their careers.

Students learn practical skills, build real-world portfolio projects, and undergo job readiness training. Our tutors offer 24x7 guidance & mentorship over Slack & Zoom. Students also get access to jobs with 200+ hiring partners.
rationale: Jovian фокусируется на практических программах с выходом на трудоустройство, а агент как раз связывает учебные цели с карьерными перспективами.

name: StudyStream
description:
StudyStream is a video platform & online community that allows students to study with others from around the world 24/7 and in real time. It brings accountability & motivation to the students from over 180 countries who study with us daily.

We have helped over 3 million students be more productive & motivated, while also feeling less isolated. Our mission is to create a global community of students who can motivate each other to succeed.
rationale: Видео сервис для групповой онлайн-работы наиболее близок к видеоплатформе для совместной учёбы, хотя StudyStream ориентирован на самоорганизацию студентов, а не на занятия с учителем.

name: Strive Math
description:
Strive is an online coding & math school for kids (8-16). We help students start and commit to their coding and math journeys by making the subjects fun and exciting. We focus, above all else, on making the process of learning joyful.

- We’re starting with coding, but we’re building the content and platform to redefine **STEM education globally** by teaching math, science, and other school subjects **through coding.**
- We believe we can only make education joyful if we ourselves are joyful, so creating a fun and exciting work environment is one of our core values. We’re a remote-first company with teachers and employees from South Africa, Singapore, India, the USA, and the Philippines.
- **We’re a well-funded startup backed by YCombinator and early investors of Spotify and Facebook.**
rationale: Стартап фокусируется на радостном обучении через игровые форматы, а агент напрямую генерирует учебные материалы в игровом формате для повышения вовлечённости.

name: AppX
description: AppX empowers creators to launch their personal apps and websites to monetise their audience via courses and premium exclusive content.
rationale: Стартап AppX — это платформа для монетизации курсов создателями, не соответствует ни одному ИИ-агенту каталога ПМО.

name: AlgoUniversity
description:
We are building live teaching infrastructure that enables handful of top educators (from Google, Facebook, etc) to coach a large number of students.
We train college students in a year-long live cohorts and they pay us a portion of their salary as fees once they get a tech job (Income Sharing Agreement)
rationale: Инфраструктура живого обучения с когортами наиболее соответствует видеосервису с комнатами для групповой онлайн-работы.

name: Kiwify
description:
Kiwify enables anyone to create and sell their online course in Brazil.
We provide payment processing, video streaming and student management
rationale: Платформа для создания и продажи онлайн-курсов не соответствует ни одному ИИ-агенту из каталога ПМО, поскольку агенты решают узкие педагогические задачи, а стартап предлагает инфраструктуру.

name: Turing College
description: Turing College is an online AI-driven school for busy professionals. We upskill & reskill in data science & AI, analytics, marketing and programming in 3-12 months with 1on1 support and flexibility.
rationale: Стартап предоставляет AI-управляемое персонализированное обучение, ядром которого является построение индивидуальной учебной траектории, что соответствует агенту генерации траектории.

name: UPchieve
description:
UPchieve is an edtech nonprofit that provides free, 24/7 online tutoring to low-income HS students. Using our app, students can request and get paired with a live volunteer in under 5 minutes. We’ve matched 100,000+ requests so far.

Right now in the US, there are 8 million low-income HS students who don’t have anyone in their home who can help them with schoolwork. UPchieve is working to change that. Our vision is simple: we want to democratize access to academic support, so that every student has an equal opportunity to attend college and achieve upward mobility.
rationale: UPchieve соединяет учеников с живыми волонтерами для репетиторства, а все агенты каталога — это ИИ-инструменты для персонализированного обучения, поэтому полного соответствия нет.

name: Poliglota
description:
Poliglota is the online language school for Latam, where group classes are led by an instructor. Over 12,000 students have paid us $500 to learn english in order to get a higher income.
We offer an online service of personalized language sessions with small groups of people of the same level, guided by expert language coaches that we train in our social methodology.
rationale: Стартап представляет собой школу языков с живыми групповыми занятиями, что не соответствует ни одному ИИ-агенту каталога.

name: Kidato
description: Parents in Africa face either public schools with student-teacher ratios as high as 50:1 or private schools with tuition fees as high as $7500 per year, per child. Kidato classes have student-teacher ratios of 5:1 and teach the same rigorous international curriculum as other private schools — but at a fraction of the price. In our second semester, Kidato has enrolled more than 30 students into our learning-from-home program as a replacement for brick-and-mortar schools. We expect to triple this enrollment by our third semester.
rationale: Kidato — это онлайн-школа с живыми уроками, а не отдельный ИИ-инструмент для персонализации, автоматической генерации контента или обратной связи, поэтому ни один агент из каталога не соответствует её сути.

name: Unschool
description: Unschool provides real-world professional education that colleges in India do not provide. We are a marketplace where college students in India can learn about technology, management and arts from high-quality courses created by experts from around the world.
rationale: Стартап представляет собой маркетплейс курсов, а не ИИ-агента для конкретной образовательной функции, поэтому не соответствует ни одному из перечисленных инструментов.

name: Codingal
description:
Codingal (www.codingal.com) is the global leader in online AI and coding education for kids and teens (Grades 1-12). Our mission is to help students fall in love with AI & coding and become creators of the future - entrepreneurs, engineers, and scientists by providing high-quality, accessible, and personalized computer science education.

In many countries, top technical universities exist, but there’s a significant gap in K-12 programming education. Parents want their kids to start learning programming early, and that’s why they choose Codingal. We offer live, interactive classes with expert instructors from Computer Science backgrounds. All our instructors are rigorously vetted and trained to ensure a high-quality learning experience.

Every student receives a personalized learning path tailored to their age and skill level. Our curriculum is STEM.org-accredited, aligned with the K–12 Computer Science Framework, and delivered in 1:1 and small-group formats, ensuring individual attention and engagement.

Students learn by building real-world projects using popular tools and technologies like Scratch, Python, Roblox, Minecraft, MIT App Inventor, Thunkable, Pygame, HTML/CSS, JavaScript, website development, Java, Data Science, AP Computer Science content, and AI tools like ChatGPT and Machine Learning frameworks. Through this hands-on approach, students create apps, games, animations, and websites in a fun, engaging way that fosters problem-solving and creative skills.

Beyond classes, students participate in global coding competitions, hackathons like HPE CodeWars, and online coding camps, further nurturing their creativity, confidence, and innovative spirit. With a 4.9/5 student rating and NPS of 86, Codingal is trusted by over 1 million registered students in 70+ countries.

Codingal combines the best of human instruction and AI-driven learning to inspire the next generation of tech leaders. We are poised to lead the next generation of coding education and make a significant impact in this rapidly growing market.
rationale: Стартап создает персонализированные учебные пути для каждого ученика, что соответствует функции ИИ-агента генерации траектории.

name: Coderhouse
description:
A web app that offers live online courses in programming, design, data, online marketing and more.

Our courses are nearly as affordable as online Moocs (~$40 a month) and as effective as Bootcamps. We achieve this by running 100 person live classes with one expert professor and one mentor per 15 students. Every class, students need to turn in assignments that are corrected by their mentors and at the end of the course they need to turn in and approve a final project. We also help our selected students with careers services such as mockup interviews, Linkedin enhancement, and more. All of this creates a level of accountability that allows us to achieve really low churn levels (<9%).

Our career tracks last between 9-11 months and we give our selected students their money back in case they don't get a job 6 months after they are done with the course.
rationale: Стартап проводит живые онлайн-занятия с профессором и менторами в малых группах, что прямо соответствует видеосервису с комнатами для групповой работы.

name: Scrimba
description: Scrimba is a coding course platform with over 120K monthly active students. It's based on a new video format that makes the screencasts fully interactive for students, and easier to create for teachers. Our vision is to create a coding school that has the quality of Stanford but the price of a gym membership.
rationale: Стартап Scrimba — платформа для интерактивных скринкастов, а в каталоге нет агента, реализующего интерактивный видео-формат уроков.

name: Kunduz
description: Kunduz is making test prep resources 10x faster and cheaper for students who prepare for university entrance tests. With its first mobile platform, Kunduz provides instant answers to students’ test prep questions through its 35,000 tutors. Kunduz currently serves students in Turkey and India.
rationale: Kunduz предоставляет мгновенные ответы на вопросы учащихся по подготовке к экзаменам, что по сути совпадает с функцией ИИ-помощника, отвечающего на вопросы по содержанию, хотя реализация основана на людях-тьюторах, а не ИИ.

name: AnnieCannons
description: AnnieCannons (AC) is a 501(c)3 nonprofit dedicated to training survivors of human trafficking and gender-based violence to be programmers, giving them both the economic and technological empowerment to invent solutions to overcome the hardships they have survived, and the capacity to support themselves and their families.
rationale: AnnieCannons нацелен на обучение программированию для экономической самостоятельности, что ближе всего к агенту профориентации, который связывает учебные цели с профессиональными перспективами.

name: AskMyClass, now Soundkins
description: AskMyClass, is a learning assistant that helps teachers save time and enhance learning, using smart speakers like Alexa, and help students get back-on-task quickly and build life skills through classroom management, social-emotional learning, and lesson support.
rationale: Стартап представляет собой голосового ассистента на базе умных колонок для управления классом и социально-эмоционального обучения, что не совпадает ни с одним ИИ-агентом каталога, сфокусированного на персонализированных траекториях, учебных материалах, обратной связи, геймификации и коллаборации.

name: Recurse Center
description:
The Recurse Center is a self-directed, educational retreat for people who want to get better at programming, whether they've been programming for three decades or three months.

The retreat is free for all participants because we run an integrated recruiting agency and provide (optional) personalized recruiting services to anyone in our community considering a new job.
rationale: Стартап предлагает самонаправляемое обучение, а агент генерирует персонализированный план достижения целей, что наиболее точно отражает суть образовательного ретрита.

name: Acely
description:
Acely is the leading AI tutor for the digital SAT and ACT, helping students get into their dream college. Our mission is to democratize opportunity for high school families through AI-native tools that empower students to learn smarter and gain confidence.

Backed by Forerunner Ventures, we've grown to $10M ARR with a lean, 10-person team, proof that small, mission-driven teams can deliver outsized impact. Our product has traction, our users are engaged, and we're now at an inflection point: ready to scale with speed, craft, and AI-native excellence.

Acely was launched out of beta in January 2024 as a spinout product from Juni (YC W18).
rationale: Acely — это AI tutor, который отвечает на вопросы учеников по содержанию курса и даёт объяснения, что соответствует агенту ИИ-помощник.

name: NEXGENT
description:
We can provide you with the skills, experience  and knowledge you need to skyrocket through the ranks of the IT industry faster than anyone even if you have zero experience right now.

Our job-ready training program (which is based on our thorough experience working at Cisco, Dimension Data, Arista, etc. and as IT instructors for the  U.S. Air Force) and and in-person certification will help you master the most in-demand networking skills in 2-5 months so that you can break into a tech job or get promoted.

Additionally, we provide 1:1 live mentorship from some of the best engineers in the world, skills assessment, career guidance and a proven system that can help you prioritize and execute your career plans confidently.

Apply to our program here: http://zerotoengineer.com
and/or
learn more here: http://help.nexgent.com
rationale: Стартап NEXGENT фокусируется на карьерном руководстве и связи обучения с профессиональным ростом, что наиболее близко к ИИ-профориентологу, соотносящему учебные цели с карьерными перспективами.

name: Nimble
description: Nimble uses predictive analytics to give every K-12 student access to excellent teachers. Our smart applicant tracking system (ATS) leverages a predictive model to help school districts identify and hire the best educators for their classrooms.
rationale: Стартап ориентирован на рекрутинг учителей и предиктивную аналитику для HR, что не соответствует ни одному агенту каталога, решающему задачи персонализации обучения, создания контента или обратной связи в учебном процессе.

name: Bloom Institute of Technology
description:
Bloom Institute of Technology is a full computer science education that's free until you get a high-paying job.

We invest in our students, train them for free, and take a portion of income if they get a job above a certain threshold. If they never make above that threshold or don't get a job in the chosen field, they never pay us a dime.
rationale: Стартап строит обучение вокруг карьерного результата, что совпадает с функцией агента-профориентолога, связывающего учебные цели с профессиональными перспективами.

name: Dost Education
description:
Dost is an ed-tech nonprofit building a platform to expand access to early childhood development in low-resource settings through parent education. Our mission is to unlock children’s full potential by focusing on early learning - the time when 90% of our brains develop.

We believe that parents of any literacy level can play a critical role in developing their children’s school and life readiness. In India alone, there are 150 million under-resourced caregivers who can benefit from resources developed for them. That’s why our team at Dost Education - educators, entrepreneurs, and engineers - are passionate about using technology and user-centric product design to change the trajectory of families’ lives.

Since 2017, we’ve grown from a small pilot with a few hundred mothers, to reaching over 100,000 families working with state governments. Join us as we continue to innovate, grow our reach, and deepen our impact. We are supported by some of the best funders in tech and social impact space like Y Combinator, Mulago, and many others.

Dost Education values diversity. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, colour, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status.
rationale: Стартап создаёт платформу для доступа родителей к образовательным материалам по раннему развитию детей, что по сути является структурированной библиотекой готового контента с поиском и фильтрацией, аналогично агенту №17.

name: ClassDojo
description: ClassDojo's mission is to give every kid an education they love. Our flagship communication app has become the world’s largest network serving kids, reaching over 51 million kids, families and teachers in 180 countries every month, entirely through word of mouth. They use it to share the best moments in a kid's day through pictures, videos, messages, and more. ClassDojo has recognized by Forbes, LinkedIn, Inc and Fast Company, and it is a top 100 Y Combinator company.
rationale: ClassDojo — коммуникационная платформа для обмена сообщениями и публикациями между учителями, учениками и родителями, что ближе всего к агенту чата.

name: Pahamify
description: Pahamify is an online learning platform for K-12 students in Indonesia. We provide high quality educational videos which can be used to learn various concepts ranging from math, science, social sciences, and language based on the local curriculum. We also provide thousands of practice questions and modules which can be used for college entry test preparation.
rationale: Pahamify — это платформа со структурированной библиотекой готовых образовательных видео и практических материалов, что максимально близко к агенту «Библиотека контента».

name: Jumpcut
description: We help aspiring creators go viral and monetize their content.
rationale: Стартап помогает создателям контента становиться вирусными и монетизировать творчество, что наиболее близко к функции автоматической оценки сложных творческих работ, которую выполняет ИИ-асессор.

name: Quero Education
description:
Quero is an online marketplace for college programs in Brazil. It helps students search, compare and enroll in programs in over 1200 partner colleges, saving money on tuition.

Follow Us:
facebook.com/queroedu
instagram.com/queroedu
twitter.com/queroedu
quero.education/carreiras
rationale: Quero Education — это маркетплейс для поиска и зачисления в программы колледжей, а не ИИ-агент из каталога персонализированной модели образования, поэтому прямого соответствия ни одному из 44 решений нет.

name: EduRev
description:
EduRev is like a Netflix for Education with a layer of social networking. We want to make the process of education and learning so good that you (and your kids) don’t feel the need to go to a school/college/coaching. EduRev stands for Education Revolution and we are looking to achieve nothing less.

EduRev has over 7 million students and adds around 10 new users each minute. We are backed by the iconic American VC Y Combinator, Artiman Ventures and even angel investors like Anand Chandrashekaran, Austen Allred, Martin Basiri to name a few.

We won the Best App award (for learning) by Google, mBillionth award by Bill and Melinda Gates, and even won Startup of the Year by TieCon.

Android App: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.edurev
Website: http://edurev.in/
iOS App (beta): https://apps.apple.com/in/app/edurev/id1529835494
rationale: EduRev позиционируется как образовательная платформа с мощным социальным компонентом и групповым взаимодействием, что ближе всего к агенту «Пространство для работы в группе», предоставляющему виртуальное рабочее пространство для совместной учёбы.

name: StayQrious
description: Imagine doing personalised workouts with a fitness coach, but for school subjects. Students log into their session that has been scheduled with their coach, they can see their learning workout for the day. Their workout typically consists of watching an interactive video, writing explanations, giving feedback to other students, making an explainer video etc. They get constant feedback and encouragement from the coach and progress only after they have understood the pre-requisites.
rationale: Стартап StayQrious по сути представляет персонализированный план обучения с прогрессией по мастерству, что наиболее близко к ИИ-агенту генерации траектории (#4), который создает пошаговый адаптивный маршрут.

name: Ello
description: Building the world's first 1:1 AI teacher.
rationale: Стартап создаёт комплексного 1:1 AI-учителя, а не отдельный специализированный инструмент из каталога.

name: Demand Curve
description:
Demand Curve is your startup's growth operating system, the lowest risk, fastest path to getting traction and growing your company.

🚀 Growth Program: A membership/course designed for startup operators who want to learn and execute growth without hiring a full team yet. Powered by our premium content library, expert guidance, and AI growth co-pilot, it's a step-by-step guide to building a growth engine that actually works. Trusted by 3,000+ startups (including over 500 YC companies).

📰 Newsletter: We also publish the Growth Newsletter, reaching 100,000+ founders and marketers every week with strategic and tactical growth advice. It's one of the most-read startup growth newsletters with 46-50% open rates.

🦄 Agency: For companies ready to scale, our agency team provides full-service execution across growth strategy, paid acquisition, and funnel optimization. We've helped scale Microsoft, Framer, Pilot, Ancestry, and hundreds of other companies and YC startups.

💸 Newsletter sponsorships: Get your brand in front of 100,000+ engaged founders and growth operators.

Learn more at demandcurve.com
rationale: Стартап предлагает программу роста с ИИ-ко-пилотом, которая по сути представляет собой персонализированный пошаговый план обучения, что близко к агенту генерации траектории.

name: Microverse
description: Training and connecting untapped talent with global opportunities
rationale: Агент помогает связать учебные цели с профессиональными возможностями, что прямо соответствует задаче стартапа по соединению талантов с глобальными карьерными шансами.

name: Outtalent
description:
We started Outtalent because we believe that talent is equally distributed, but opportunity is not and emerging markets have an exceptional number of great but undervalued engineers. We believe getting a job at one of the world’s best companies sets people on a great path to realize their full potential.

Outtalent is funded by YCombinator, world-class venture capital funds, executives from Google and Facebook, and other angel investors who are passionate about our mission. We have already helped software engineers from Russia, Ukraine and Central Asia get jobs at Google, Amazon, Microsoft and many other companies in the US, Canada, and Europe.
rationale: Стартап Outtalent помогает инженерам получить работу в ведущих компаниях, что наиболее близко к ИИ-профориентологу, который связывает учебные цели с профессиональными перспективами.

name: Juno College of Technology
description: Juno is the university of the future.
rationale: Университет будущего фокусируется на персонализированной траектории обучения, а агент генерации траектории строит индивидуальный пошаговый план, соответствующий концепции Juno.

name: Prenda
description: Prenda makes it easy to open a K-8 microschool in your home, studio or office. We start with an adult guide who cares about kids and believes in the power of learning. Often this is the mom of one of the students. She recruits a class of up to 10 students, and we provide everything she needs to run a microschool - training, support, software, curriculum, and funding so she gets paid. In
rationale: Prenda предоставляет платформу для микрошкол с виртуальным рабочим пространством для группового взаимодействия, что наиболее близко к функции агента 39, создающего пространство для совместной работы групп.

name: Schoolable
description:
We are a financial technology company that is revolutionizing the state of pre-tertiary education in Africa.

By paying school fees for parents upfront with a flexible monthly repayment plan, building fees savings culture among parents, This way, schools get up to 80% of all their expected fees 2weeks into resumption and also enabling schools to access to loan facility and availability of various vendors and service providers at discounted rates.
rationale: Стартап является финтех-решением для оплаты школьных сборов и кредитования, не связан с образовательными ИИ-агентами каталога.

name: Edyst
description:
Edyst is a Y Combinator-funded company (W19) working in the online learning & employability space. We’re looking to collaborate with people who want to significantly change the current learning and employability system in India.

In a span of 2 years, we have hit some pretty impressive figures that some of the most established names haven’t:

- Our course completion rates are more than 80% (8x the industry average)
- Students spend an average of 95 minutes daily on the platform (5x the industry average)
- 50% placement ratio (2x the industry average)

We need more mavericks for this journey: people who love challenges & puzzles; people who love to learn & grow; people who want to significantly change the current learning and employability system.
rationale: Агент-профориентолог напрямую связывает обучение с карьерными перспективами, что соответствует фокусу Edyst на трудоустройство и осмысленность обучения.

name: AccioJob
description:
AccioJob is an ed-tech startup run by IIT Delhi Alumni that provides a comprehensive state-of-the-art learning platform for Full Stack Web Development and Data Analytics.

Our industry-relevant curriculum is taught by top tech instructors and mentors, and our students have gone on to work at leading tech companies like Amazon, Salesforce, and Walmart, among others. With job placement opportunities at 300+ top tech partner companies, we have placed 1000+ students in 2022 itself at an average salary of 8.3 LPA
rationale: Стартап AccioJob нацелен на трудоустройство и связь обучения с карьерой, что совпадает с функцией ИИ-профориентолога, помогающего соотнести учебные цели с профессиональными перспективами.

name: Skill-lync
description: Skill-Lync provides job leading engineering education online. We started with a special focus in Mechanical, Electrical, Electronics, Civil & Computer Science engineering and have become one of the world's leading & highest rated platforms in teaching high-end technical skills that help students get a job.
rationale: Стартап предоставляет инженерное обучение с прямым фокусом на трудоустройство, что наиболее соответствует агенту, который связывает учебные цели с профессиональными перспективами.

name: RocketLit
description:
RocketLit gives all students better access to learning and educators access to the data they need to be most impactful.

Our first product, RocketLit, is an adaptive and personalized learning platform that serves reading to students at their independent level. Students read the same content at different levels of complexity and fluidly move up reading levels as they improve.

InnerOrbit is our new Science Assessment platform, giving students, teachers and administrators the practice and data they need to be successful on science tests. We serve the highest quality content and feature the most detailed reporting on the market.

We’re a small and focused team working to change the world through science education. Our company has served over 650k students and we’re on track to more than double that number in the next year. We’re looking for folks who’ll grow into a leadership role within the organization.
rationale: RocketLit подаёт один и тот же учебный контент на разных уровнях сложности чтения, что соответствует функционалу агента разноуровневого контента.

name: Our World in Data
description:
Poverty, disease, hunger, climate change, war, existential risks, and inequality: The world faces many great and terrifying problems. It is these large problems that our work at Our World in Data focuses on.

Our World in Data publishes an open-access publication where users can understand the state of the world today, where we are making progress and where we are falling behind. Through interactive data visualizations we can see how the world has changed; by summarizing the scientific literature we can understand why. We cover everything from global poverty to natural disasters, education and health; we have 3405 charts across 297 topics.

Our World in Data is free, open-source and provided as a public good. It has millions of users every month, and is cited in research and media across the world every day. This allows millions of people to understand the large problems the world is facing, and how we can solve them.
rationale: Стартап представляет собой структурированную библиотеку открытых образовательных материалов (визуализаций данных) с поиском и фильтрацией по темам, что близко к агенту 'Библиотека контента'.

name: Mimir
description:
Mimir is venture backed startup in Indianapolis, Ind., focused on creating products to better computer science. We’re hiring rapidly to help satisfy the educational needs of instructors and students all over the world. Our primary product, the Mimir Classroom, is deployed in more than 70 universities allowing computer science instructors to teach their courses more effectively!

We don’t need (or want) you to be perfect, but we expect you to work hard, move fast, and constantly iterate until we get it right. If you’re looking to be challenged every day, make a huge impact, and help define a large part of the future of computer science, then this job is for you.
rationale: Стартап Mimir Classroom помогает преподавателям компьютерных наук эффективнее вести курсы, что напрямую связано с автоматизацией проверки и оценки студенческих работ, как это делает агент «ИИ-проверка задач».

name: Study Edge
description: Study Edge is a leading education company that develops and distributes customized content (primarily video) for courses at the middle-school, high-school, and collegiate levels, in partnership with universities, state education agencies, and other institutions.
rationale: Стартап создаёт кастомизированный образовательный контент, а агент генерирует учебные материалы по запросу, что наиболее соответствует их профилю.

name: Fullstack Academy
description: Fullstack Academy's JavaScript-driven curriculum immerses you in the latest web technologies including Node.js, React and MongoDB. You bring the energy, curiosity and dedication — we'll provide a world-class environment for becoming an expert software developer.
rationale: Стартап предлагает готовую интенсивную программу обучения веб-технологиям, что по сути является траекторией, аналогичной функции агента генерации персонализированного плана, хотя и без ИИ-адаптации.

name: Knowmia
description: Knowmia is a destination for learning that features short video lessons from great teachers everywhere. We help you to find what you need to succeed in school in a personal, affordable, and time-efficient way. By bringing together a wide range of video lessons and making it easy to find what you need, we help you with challenging topics, prepare you for an upcoming test or new course, and find the right teacher for your style of learning.
rationale: Knowmia представляет собой библиотеку коротких видеоуроков с поиском и фильтрацией, что напрямую соответствует функции агента «Библиотека контента».

name: Awari
description: We're replacing masters degrees in Brazil with cohort-based courses for top talent to advance their careers in tech. The programs incorporate hands-on learning with sessions led by experts from high-profile companies like Rappi, Nubank, Apple, Google, and more.
rationale: Стартап представляет собой программу замены магистратуры с кохортными курсами и экспертными сессиями, что не соответствует ни одному ИИ-агенту из каталога.

name: FunctionUp (FanPlay)
description: A technical placement bootcamp in the Income Sharing Model. We train top tech talent with 0 upfront fee and place them across our partner companies. Also our program has a deep social impact. We  provide special assistance to women and unemployed youth in India- both economically and socially.
rationale: Стартап — технический буткемп с фокусом на трудоустройство, что наиболее близко к агенту профориентации, помогающему связать учебные цели с карьерными перспективами.

name: Strive School
description: In exchange for a part of their future salary, select students can become professional-grade software engineers through a six-month online program. While the majority of universities in Europe are free to attend, STEM courses are often outdated and theoretical; Strive School works with those pursuing STEM fields to help them become job-ready software engineers.
rationale: Стартап предоставляет программу обучения, превращающую студента в профессионального разработчика, что наиболее сходно с созданием персонализированной учебной траектории, хотя это не ИИ-агент, а целостный курс.

name: Edwin
description:
It combines the latest adaptive learning and Natural Language Understanding technology with pedagogical content as well as on-demand human instructors to offer its students affordable, personalized, 1:1 learning. Based in San Francisco, the company was funded by General Catalyst, Y Combinator, Google Assistant Investments Program, and several other investors. Over 800 thousand students have improved their English with Edwin.

In early 2020 Edwin merged with MyBuddy.ai. The resulting company kept the name “Buddy.ai”. Headquartered in San Francisco, it focuses on building a virtual English conversation partner for over 500 million children around the globe who are trying to learn English, but can't reach fluency because they lack genuine practice speaking the language.
